9:T2fc2,<div class="specification">
<p>A lamp is located 6.0 m from a screen.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p>Somewhere between the lamp and the screen, a lens is placed so that it produces a real inverted image on the screen. The image produced is 4.0 times larger than the lamp.</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Identify the nature of the lens.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Determine the distance between the lamp and the lens.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Calculate the focal length of the lens.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>The lens is moved to a second position where the image on the screen is again focused. The lamp–screen distance does not change. Compare the characteristics of this new image with the original image.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>a:T696,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>converging/positive/biconvex/plane convex</p>
<p><em>Do not accept convex.</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\frac{v}{u} = 4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mfrac>
<mi>v</mi>
<mi>u</mi>
</mfrac>
<mo>=</mo>
<mn>4</mn>
</math></span><br/><em>Award <strong>[3]</strong> for a bald correct answer.</em></p>
<p><em>v </em>+ <em>u </em>= 6<br/><em>Allow <strong>[1]</strong> if the answer is 4.8 «m».</em></p>
<p>so lens is 1.2 «m» from object <em><strong>or</strong></em> u = 1.2 «m»</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>«<span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\frac{1}{u} + \frac{1}{v} = \frac{1}{f}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mfrac>
<mn>1</mn>
<mi>u</mi>
</mfrac>
<mo>+</mo>
<mfrac>
<mn>1</mn>
<mi>v</mi>
</mfrac>
<mo>=</mo>
<mfrac>
<mn>1</mn>
<mi>f</mi>
</mfrac>
</math></span>, so <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\frac{1}{{1.2}} + \frac{1}{{4.8}} = \frac{1}{f}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mfrac>
<mn>1</mn>
<mrow>
<mn>1.2</mn>
</mrow>
</mfrac>
<mo>+</mo>
<mfrac>
<mn>1</mn>
<mrow>
<mn>4.8</mn>
</mrow>
</mfrac>
<mo>=</mo>
<mfrac>
<mn>1</mn>
<mi>f</mi>
</mfrac>
</math></span>, so» <em>f </em>= 0.96 «m» <em><strong>or</strong></em> 1 «m»</p>
<p><em>Watch for ECF from (b)</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>real AND inverted</p>
<p>smaller OR diminished </p>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/c/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","c"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"16N.3.SL.TZ0.12"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"16N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","c-1-introduction-to-imaging"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$9"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">d.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
